final:
module lfsr (
  input clk,
  input ld,
  input [5:0] d,
  output reg [5:0] q);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (ld)
        q <= d;
    else
        q <= {q[4:0], q[5] ^ q[4]};
end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      q <= q; // This statement does not change the value of q
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: q <= q; // This statement does not change the value of q
